posts.title: Rep. Brandon Gill (R-TX): "To Illustrate The Total ABSURDITY of Justice Jackson, she ruled last year that states *do not* have the right to ban child sex changes, but ruled today that states *do* have the right to ban counselors from telling boys they are not girls." The Supreme Court ruled 8-1...

quotedTweet.content:
The Supreme Court ruled 8-1 against a Colorado law banning “conversion therapy” for LGBTQ minors, finding that it violates the First Amendment.  

Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson was the lone dissenter.  

Follow: @AFpost

twitter.content: To illustrate the total absurdity of Justice Jackson, she ruled last year that states *do not* have the right to ban child sex changes, but ruled today that states *do* have the right to ban counselors from telling boys they are not girls.

posts.title: BREAKING: President Trump Responds After Judge HALTS White House Ballroom Construction

twitter.content:
🚨 BREAKING: A judge has just just BLOCKED President Trump from constructing his White House ballroom until CONGRESS authorizes it.

ABSOLUTELY UNBELIEVABLE!

This judge is WAY overstepping his authority.

Impeach, appeal and KEEP BUILDING.

posts.title: Rep. Brandon Gill (R-TX): "To Illustrate The Total ABSURDITY of Justice Jackson, she ruled last year that states *do not* have the right to ban child sex changes, but ruled today that states *do* have the right to ban counselors from telling boys they are not girls." The Supreme Court ruled 8-1...

quotedTweet.content:
The Supreme Court ruled 8-1 against a Colorado law banning “conversion therapy” for LGBTQ minors, finding that it violates the First Amendment.  

Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson was the lone dissenter.  

Follow: @AFpost

twitter.content: To illustrate the total absurdity of Justice Jackson, she ruled last year that states *do not* have the right to ban child sex changes, but ruled today that states *do* have the right to ban counselors from telling boys they are not girls.
